subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Every blind one who hath insight into the Cause of God, his eyes are illumined and his vision clear [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی هر ضریر که در امرالله بصیر است چشمش روشن است و دیده او بینا حضرت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
